source_context:
CV Assistant is a single-page web application (SPA) running at localhost:8420.
The UI has a collapsible sidebar with 6 navigation groups and 17 views.

Sidebar navigation groups and their views:

CHAT group:
- Main Chat: WebSocket streaming chat with the CV Assistant agent.
  Features markdown rendering, KaTeX math, syntax-highlighted code blocks.

AGENTS group:
- All Agents: Card grid of 5 specialist sub-agents (Blog Writer, Website Maintenance,
  Model Training, Data Visualization, Paper→Code). Click Chat to open dedicated session.
- Agent Chat: Per-agent conversation with its own WebSocket endpoint /ws/agent/<id>.
- Pinned skills appear here as shortcut nav items (drag to reorder).

CONTROL group:
- Overview: System health — ZeroClaw status, Ollama connectivity, model readiness.
- Channels: Connect to Telegram, Discord, Slack, Email for push notifications.
- Models: Three panels — Server Management (start/stop Ollama/ImgGen/OCR servers),
  Model Management (HF catalog with SSE download progress), Ollama (pull models, llmfit ranking).
- Sessions: Browse active agent conversation sessions.
- Jobs: Scheduled tasks — Weekly Digest (auto Monday), Model Fine-Tuning (configure + stream).

CORE group:
- Skills: 20 skill cards grouped by category. Each shows Ready/Needs Install/Needs Power badge,
  tool chips, and Open/Install buttons. Pinnable to sidebar.
- Datasets: HuggingFace + Kaggle search. Pre-catalog of 11 datasets with SSE download,
  visualize button (annotation-aware image grid, lightbox, pagination).
- Powers: External API key configuration — HuggingFace, Kaggle, Email, GitHub, Brave, etc.

RESEARCH group:
- Knowledge Vault: Split-view Obsidian markdown browser (file tree + rendered note).
- Knowledge Graph: Canvas-based interactive paper/concept graph (draggable nodes).
- Specs: Split-view spec.md browser with Raw toggle.
- Digests: Split-view weekly digest browser.

SETTINGS group:
- Config: ZeroClaw status card + agent_config.yaml viewer.
- Cache: LLM response cache stats, Clear Expired.
- Debug: Runtime diagnostic information.
- Logs: Live SSE server log stream with auto-scroll.
communicative_intent: CV Assistant single-page app: 6 navigation groups, 17 views spanning chat, agents, control, skills, research, and settings.
